name: Ceramic Citronella Hourglass Cotton Wick Outdoor Candle Burgundy 10oz - Threshold™
description:
Add soft illumination and soothing scents to any space with the Ceramic Lemongrass and Citronella Hourglass Cotton Wick Jar Candle from Threshold™. This burgundy jar candle is designed in an hourglass shape with embossed stripes on the exterior for a delightful look. The one-wick candle has a mix of lemongrass and citronella scents for a refreshing vibe, and it burns for around 40 hours.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
